title: Strategy
text:
Remember that a 3-rail pattern moves: top → middle → bottom → middle → top → … . 
Try to think about how many letters land on each rail before the message is read off row by row.

title: Example
text:
Count how many steps the zig-zag takes: 1 → 2 → 3 → 2 → 1 → … . 
Use this cycle to assign letters from the encoded message back into the rails. Start by filling rail 1 with its letters, then rail 2, then rail 3. Once all rails are filled, trace the zig-zag path to recover the original phrase.
